title: Carpet Trapdoors
description: Simple mod that disguises iron/wood trapdoors as carpets.
body:
# Carpet Trapdoors
This mod adds the ability to craft trapdoors that are covered in/look like carpets.

## Goal
The goal of this mod is to create hidden pathways in your base, or to serve as decorative elements.

## Misc
- All trapdoors retain full vanilla functionality (wooden and iron).
- Recipes support all types of wooden (minecraft:wooden_trapdoors) and iron trapdoors, and every carpet variant.
- Models use texture references, so any texture pack will work seamlessly.
